THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $368.00 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JORDAN VINSON. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $369.00 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM. THOSE WHO HAVE NOT MADE AN APPEARANCE ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. AT THE REQUEST OF PETITIONER, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO SEPTEMBER 28, 2017 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. PETITIONER TO RE-SERVE THE PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: CHARLES GEERHART, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is Off calendar per moving party. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Rebecca Wagner In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Continued To Sep-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM

Appearances: Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the District Attorney (415.553.4997) for petitioner and moving party; No other appearances.

Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. At the request of petitioner, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to September 28, 2017 at 9:00 am in department 302. Petitioner to re-serve the parties. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
